REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. AS IT APPEARS FROM UNCONTROVERTED DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL, PLAINTIFF FAILED TO RESPOND TO DEFENDANT'S MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS IN GOOD FAITH. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN-PERSON OR VIA TELEPHONE THE WEEK OF NOVEMBER 11, 2024 ON A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DATE AND TIME. IF PARTIES CANNOT AGREE ON A DATE, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER ON NOVEMBER 13, 2024 AT 2:00 P.M. NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 18, 2024 PARTIES TO FILE DECLARATIONS (OR A JOINT DECLARATION) ATTESTING TO GOOD FAITH MEET AND CONFER CONFERENCE IN-PERSON OR OVER THE PHONE. IF NECESSARY, DEFENDANT MAY FILE A MOTION TO STRIKE NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 25, 2024. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-09-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANTS SIDE, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION D/B/A KINOKO REAL ESTATE, ADRIAN TAN MOTION TO COMPEL THE DEPOSITIONS OF PLAINTIFFS JAMES MANN & LAUREN DUDLEY IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER FORTHWITH, AND BY NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, ABOUT DATES. IF MANN AND DUDLEY FAIL TO PROVIDE REASONABLE DATES, DEFENDANTS MAY SET THE DATES. THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFFS, JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY, TO PAY $2510 TO SIDE INC. AND TAN BY MARCH 23, 2026. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING) PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED. MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Plaintiffs James Mann & Lauren Dudley
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS SIDE, INC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION D/B/A KINOKO REAL ESTATE, ADRIAN TAN Motion To Compel The Depositions Of Plaintiffs James Mann & Lauren Dudley

Defendants Side, Inc. and Adrian Tan's unopposed motion to compel the depositions of James Mann and Lauren Dudley is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. The parties are ordered to meet and confer forthwith, and by no later than March 11, about dates. If Mann and Dudley fail to provide reasonable dates, defendants may set the dates.

Defendants seek sanctions. The failure to submit to an authorized method of discovery is a misuse of the discovery process, and Plaintiffs' failure to provide dates or cooperate to submit to depositions lacks substantial justification. The court orders Plaintiffs, jointly and severally, to pay $2510 to Side Inc. and Tan by March 23, 2026.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CVA)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. As it appears from uncontroverted declaration of Defendant's counsel, Plaintiff failed to respond to Defendant's meet and confer efforts in good faith. The parties are ordered to meet and confer in-person or via telephone the week of November 11, 2024 on a mutually agreeable date and time. If parties cannot agree on a date, the parties must meet and confer on November 13, 2024 at 2:00 p.m. No later than November 18, 2024 parties to file declarations (or a joint declaration) attesting to good faith meet and confer conference in-person or over the phone. If necessary, Defendant may file a Motion to Strike no later than November 25, 2024.
